reason: Rewrote one-shot prefetch flow into two-phase agentic. Phase 1: chat.completions.create tool loop over PHASE1_TOOLS (listRelatedCommits/getCommitDiff/searchDiscordMessages/searchPastCommits/readRepoPlanningDocs/readTeamState + terminal draftHandoff), tool_choice 'auto' until forceDraft (totalRounds>=CAP-1 || toolCalls>=MAX) forces draftHandoff. Phase 2: beta.chat.completions.parse reviewer (HandoffReviewSchema) in a separate short thread; score>=4 or cap finalizes, score<4 re-injects gaps into the SAME Phase-1 thread and redrafts. Q6: draftHandoff wins same-turn. Guards TOTAL_ROUNDS_CAP=5/MAX_TOOL_CALLS=12/REVIEW_PASS_SCORE=4 + HARD_ROUND_CEILING safety net. Preserved result shape {handoffMarkdown,cached}, cache (force) short-circuit, not-found guard, best-effort write-back. Empty draft -> HttpsError('internal').

NEW. Read-only best-effort data access for Phase 1 (mirrors assignTools/dailyIntel): listRelatedCommits(repoId, taskIds) lifts the linkedTaskIds array-contains+orderBy query (COMMITS_PER_TASK/MAX_COMMITS cap + composite-index degrade try/catch, Rule D); getCommitDiff(repoId, sha) resolves owner/repo/token via shared resolveRepoContext then calls githubClient.getCommitDiff(..., MAX_PATCH_CHARS=12000), returning null on any failure (prd R6). Never calls OpenAI; OpenAI tool schemas + dispatcher live in the flow.

Q1: added getCommitDiff(owner, repo, token, sha, maxPatchChars) returning CommitDiff{sha,message,files:CommitDiffFile[],truncated}. Keeps the per-file data.files[].patch that getCommit strips; accumulates patch chars and drops later files' patch to null once over budget (truncated=true); binary files (no patch) surface as null. getCommit/CommitDetail/explainCommit contract untouched. All GitHub access stays in this file (ARCHITECTURE §6.4).

Reworked for two-phase: generateHandoffSystem now an agentic 'retrieve evidence via tools, then draftHandoff' prompt keeping the four-section format + grounding rules. NEW generateHandoffSeedContext (Phase-1 first user msg: task + prerequisites title/status only, no prefetch — Q5), handoffReviewSystem + handoffReviewContext (reviewer {score,gaps}), handoffGapsFeedback (gaps re-injection user message).

Q2: exported the existing module-private resolveRepoContext (repo name->owner/repo on first '/', createdBy->users/{createdBy}.githubAccessToken) + one-line JSDoc note that handoffTools shares it. No logic duplicated. W4 file — coordinate note only (single keyword + JSDoc line added).
Unchanged — HandoffReviewSchema {score 1-5, gaps[]} + HandoffReview type were already pre-staged (37-42); imported and used as-is, no new zod schema.

§R1 AI never commits/pushes (orchestrator-authorized branch commit only, no push); §R2 no deploy/index; §R3 no new npm deps; §3.3 matched surrounding style (assignTask tool loop, breakdownTask parse path, repoDocs best-effort). onTaskUpdated trigger + handlers/generateHandoff untouched (signature unchanged).
